name: dispatched-within-budget-stays-dispatched
description: YB-10 rehome (plan task 3.1) of Detector.Tests.ps1's 'a dispatched within budget stays dispatched (the gradient, not a cliff)' case (S3.3): elapsed under budget must not tip the state to overdue. budget_source: 'record' added at the C3R-1 fix cycle (spec Amendment 2, issue #22) - the record supplied its own budget. Provenance: OBSERVED - expected block generated by running scripts/Detect-Dispatches.ps1 at repo commit 896e10e on this exact input (2026-07-23), then REGENERATED at the fix-cycle commit adding budget_source, then reviewed for correctness against the pre-existing imperative assertion this vector replaces.
